# D-0013: __init__.py Generation Markers

## File

`src/superclaude/cli/cli_portify/__init__.py`

## Marker Format

```python
# Generated by superclaude cli-portify
# Portified from <skill_name>
```

Both markers are present as Python comments at the top of the file, before the module docstring.

## Collision Detection Compatibility

The markers are detectable by `is_portified_module()` in `utils.py` and `_check_collision()` in `config.py`.

## Validation

```
grep -c "Generated by\|Portified from" src/superclaude/cli/cli_portify/__init__.py
→ 2
```
